name: unitares-governance
description: Codex adapter for UNITARES governance: onboarding, diagnostics, dialectic review, and shared knowledge workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-side governance commands, diagnostics, and shared memory workflows.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to a running UNITARES governance server for onboarding, continuity repair, milestone check-ins, dialectic review, and knowledge graph workflows.
defaultPrompt: Start or resume my UNITARES session in Codex.
Check me into UNITARES after this milestone.
Diagnose my current UNITARES continuity and governance state.
